tagline: NZ's leading waterproofing specialists — flat roofs, decks, basements and wet areas nationwide
description: H2OFF is a leading NZ waterproofing company with a presence across Auckland, Whangarei, Tauranga, Hamilton, Nelson, Christchurch, Dunedin, Queenstown, Wanaka, and Invercargill. Founded in 2013, H2OFF specialises in membrane waterproofing and flat roofing for residential, commercial, and industrial properties — covering new construction and waterproofing replacements. Their complete service includes carpentry work and full project management, with a reputation for good communication, punctuality, and clean worksites. Products include Nuralite Nuraply 3PM torch-on, Enviroclad TPO, Butynol, Volclay Swelltite, and Ecotuff TPO. All work complies with NZ Building Code Clause B2 Durability (15-year minimum system life). Free inspections, reports, and estimates available.
known_for: Complete waterproofing and flat roofing across NZ — torch-on, TPO, Butynol, deck and basement waterproofing, nationwide coverage.
